title: Ethereum Protocol Fellowship Opens Applications for 7th Cohort
summary: The Ethereum Foundation is accepting applications for its seventh cohort of the Ethereum Protocol Fellowship (EPF7) until May 13. An introductory town hall is scheduled for May 6 at 1500 UTC to discuss program details.
body:
The Ethereum Foundation has announced that applications for the seventh cohort of the Ethereum Protocol Fellowship (EPF7) are now open. This program aims to support developers and researchers working on improving the Ethereum protocol. Interested individuals can apply until May 13, 2026.

The EPF7 will include an introductory town hall on May 6 at 1500 UTC, where participants can learn more about the program's details and expectations. The fellowship provides financial support, mentorship, and resources to selected fellows, enabling them to contribute meaningfully to Ethereum's development.

This initiative is crucial for everyday users because it helps ensure the Ethereum network remains secure, scalable, and user-friendly. By supporting developers and researchers, the fellowship drives innovation and improvements that benefit all Ethereum users.

For those interested in applying, the deadline is May 13. Potential applicants should review the program details on the Ethereum Foundation's blog and attend the town hall for more information. This is a great opportunity for developers and researchers to make a significant impact on the Ethereum ecosystem.
twitterThread: 🚀 The Ethereum Protocol Fellowship (EPF7) is now accepting applications! Deadline: May 13.
💡 EPF7 supports developers & researchers improving Ethereum. Includes mentorship & funding. Town hall May 6 at 1500 UTC.
🔗 Want to shape the future of Ethereum? Apply now! Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-24-ethereum-protocol-fellowship-opens-applications-for-7th-cohort
